rules.turn_indicator: text-2xl md:text-4xl font-playfair font-black tracking-widest uppercase

global.container: relative w-full h-[100dvh] bg-[#0A0A0F] overflow-hidden text-white flex flex-col
global.dealer_subtitle_bar: absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 p-4 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0F]/60 border-b border-[#D4AF37]/20 flex justify-center items-center text-[#D4AF37]
global.game_voice_dock_reservation: fixed bottom-4 right-4 w-16 h-16 z-50 pointer-events-none
global.bottom_action_bar: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-4 pr-24 pb-8 bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0A0F] via-[#0A0A0F]/90 to-transparent z-40 flex flex-col gap-4
global.bet_summary_chip: self-center px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md flex gap-4 text-sm font-mono

surfaces.glass_panel: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]

layout.dealer_area: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-start pt-24
layout.player_area: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-end pb-32
layout.bet_circle: w-20 h-20 rounded-full border-2 border-dashed border-[#D4AF37]/50 flex items-center justify-center mb-8 relative

interactions.actions: grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 w-full max-w-md mx-auto
interactions.action_button: h-12 rounded-xl bg-white/10 hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-black transition-all text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

animations.card_deal: Slide from top center, slight rotation, spring physics
animations.win_banner: Tracing beam border glow (gold), scale up

layout.wheel_area: h-[40vh] w-full flex items-center justify-center pt-20 relative
layout.history_strip: absolute top-20 right-4 flex flex-col gap-1 z-30

interactions.number_cell: aspect-square flex items-center justify-center border border-white/20 text-white font-mono text-sm relative cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/20

layout.dealer_area: h-[40vh] flex items-center justify-between px-8 pt-20
layout.banker_zone: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center border-b-2 border-[#1E40AF]/50 pb-4
layout.player_zone: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center border-b-2 border-[#E63946]/50 pb-4
layout.betting_zones: flex-1 flex flex-col justify-end pb-32 px-4 gap-2
layout.roadmap_mini: absolute bottom-32 left-4 h-24 w-48 bg-white/5 rounded-lg border border-white/10 p-2 overflow-hidden

interactions.bet_button: flex-1 py-6 rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2
interactions.squeeze_overlay: fixed inset-0 z-[60] bg-black/90 flex items-center justify-center

image_urls.description: Black leather padded background for premium borders/edges
Cinematic close-up of roulette wheel for the spinning area

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure <GameVoiceDock /> is NEVER covered by your new UI elements. Keep bottom right clear.
Do NOT alter the game logic, state management, or component wiring. Only replace the JSX rendering with these Tailwind classes and Framer Motion wrappers.
Implement the 'dealer subtitle bar' absolutely at the top.
For cards, stick strictly to the white background with #E63946 (red) and #111111 (black) suits to ensure crisp legibility on the dark theme.
Inject the data-testids on all interactive elements as mapped.
